flavorText: Abjurers specialize in warding magic, protection, and negation of hostile spells.

features.description: The gold and time to copy Abjuration spells into your spellbook are halved.

When you cast an Abjuration spell of 1st level or higher, create a magical ward with hit points equal to 2 × spell level + Intelligence modifier. The ward absorbs damage first and can be recharged by casting more Abjuration spells.
When a creature within 30 feet takes damage, you can use your reaction to have your Arcane Ward absorb that damage instead.
Add your proficiency bonus to ability checks made as part of Abjuration spells such as Counterspell and Dispel Magic.
You have advantage on saving throws against spells and resistance to damage from spells.

abjurer-abjuration-savant.summary: Your spellbook growth rewards leaning hard into protective abjuration magic.

abjurer-arcane-ward.summary: Build a protective ward that soaks incoming punishment before it reaches your real hit points.
abjurer-arcane-ward.description: Arcane Ward is what makes the Abjurer feel distinct on the table. You are not only denying magic conceptually; you are carrying a visible defensive buffer that changes how safely you can stand in dangerous scenes.

abjurer-projected-ward.summary: Spend your ward to protect someone else when they are about to take the hit instead of you.

abjurer-improved-abjuration.summary: Your mastery of countering and unmaking magic becomes much more dependable.

abjurer-spell-resistance.summary: You become markedly harder for hostile spells to land on cleanly.
